title: August/September Focus Meeting
purpose: Decide what August/September should accomplish, how programming and audience strategy work together, what operating structure needs to change, and what concrete outputs the team must leave with.

title: Workshop Post-Mortem and Funnel Reset
purpose: Review July workshop performance, public cleanup proof, audience/funnel lessons, ad/listing/social data, website/tracking needs, and decisions required before future workshop dates or offers are announced.

title: Andrew/Richard Role-Clarity Conversation
purpose: Clarify Richard's role lanes, recurring responsibilities, decision rights, escalation rules, and what should stop routing through Andrew by default.
